# mihari_monitors (Data Source)

Lists Mihari monitors with optional filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mihari_monitors" "active_http" {
  type      = "http_status"
  is_active = true
}

output "active_http_monitors" {
  value = data.mihari_monitors.active_http.monitors[*].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `is_active` (Boolean) Filter by active status.
- `name` (String) Filter by monitor name.
- `type` (String) Filter by monitor type.

### Read-Only

- `monitors` (Attributes List) List of monitors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitors))

<a id="nestedatt--monitors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitors`

Read-Only:

- `check_interval` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `protocol` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `url` (String)
